name: clara-kai-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Kai, Kai handling a team-operations scenario, and Kai returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Vacation planning scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, a technician wants vacation next month and we need shift coverage. How would you coordinate that?

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
